message:
refactor(parquet): DRY consolidation with readNumericColumn helper

Add generic readNumericColumn() helper to reduce duplication:
- Uses comptime T for type and field name for DecodedPage field access
- Consolidates readInt64/32/Float64/32/BoolColumn (5 funcs)
- Each now becomes a single-line wrapper

parquet_table.zig: 325 → 198 lines (-127, 39% reduction)
